title: SoundHound AI Inc (SOUN) Q3 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue Growth Amidst Challenges
text: SoundHound AI reported strong financial growth in Q3 2025, achieving record revenue of $114 million in the first three quarters of 2025, marking a 127% increase year-over-year. For the quarter alone, the company generated $42 million in revenue with 68% year-over-year growth. The company maintained solid gross margins, with a 43% GAAP gross margin and 59% non-GAAP gross margin. However, profitability remains elusive, with a GAAP net loss of $109.3 million (affected by fair value adjustments) and a non-GAAP net loss of $13 million. Adjusted EBITDA showed a loss of $14.5 million. Operating expenses increased across categories: R&D rose 17% to $22.8 million, sales and marketing jumped 96% to $16.4 million, and general and administrative expenses climbed 43% to $24.3 million. Despite losses, SoundHound maintains a strong balance sheet with cash and equivalents of $269 million and no debt. Management provided full-year 2025 revenue guidance of $165-180 million. Key challenges include ongoing pressure in the automotive sector due to global tariffs and industry softness and an increasingly competitive landscape in enterprise AI solutions.
